title: pseudocyclosorus esquirolii
intro: Pseudocyclosorus esquirolii, also known as the Chinese ironfern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure and improve blood circulation. The health benefits of Pseudocyclosorus esquirolii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Pseudocyclosorus esquirolii is often prepared as a decoction or a tea, and its extracts are also used in various herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures.
